synergy:setting-entity-tick-lod-tooltip: Distance-based tick frequency reduction for non-player entities
synergy:setting-entity-spawn-budget-tool: Frame-budgeted spawn processing to eliminate teleport/login freezes
synergy:setting-chunk-priority-tooltip: Process near chunks first for faster perceived world loading
synergy:setting-particle-lod-tooltip: Skip particle ticks for distant entities
synergy:setting-position-throttle-toolti: Reduce processing of distant entity position packets
synergy:setting-block-tick-pool-tooltip: Eliminate BlockPos allocations in random block tick loop
synergy:setting-pathfinding-cache-toolti: Short-lived result sharing for entities pathfinding to similar destinations
synergy:setting-network-flush-tooltip: Batch small packets into fewer network frames
synergy:setting-inventory-scan-tooltip: Skip full inventory iteration when nothing changed
synergy:setting-block-tick-falloff-toolt: Reduce tick frequency at range edges (slightly alters vanilla behavior)
synergy:setting-server-hints-tooltip: Send server load data to clients for adaptive optimization
synergy:setting-tracking-hysteresis-tool: Buffer zone to prevent entity pop-in/pop-out flickering at view distance boundary
synergy:setting-send-frequency-tooltip: Reduce position packet rate for distant entities from 30 Hz to 15 Hz
synergy:setting-attribute-resync-tooltip: Convert unnecessary full entity resyncs into lightweight delta updates
synergy:setting-spawn-priority-tooltip: Sort entity spawns by distance so nearby entities appear first
synergy:setting-activation-range-tooltip: Skip ticking distant entities to reduce server CPU usage
synergy:setting-collision-fast-path-tool: Skip collision checks for stationary entities with no environmental flags
